headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From Datadog’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Datadog’s first quarter results were shaped by broad-based customer demand across both AI-native and traditional enterprise clients. Management attributed the 32% year-over-year revenue acceleration to increased multi-product adoption and the rapid onboarding of large enterprise customers, particularly in AI research and hyperscale technology sectors. CEO Olivier Pomel highlighted that Datadog’s platform is becoming increasingly mission-critical, emphasizing low customer churn and deeper engagem
